title: xanthocephalum glutinosum
intro: Xanthocephalum glutinosum, also known as yellowhead, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Xanthocephalum glutinosum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
